pages.text: $(italic)Spice of Life: Classic$() — not a guide so much as a mirror. Right-click it and it shows the foods you've eaten lately — the very list that decides how well each one still feeds you. Read it alongside $(l:2_hearth_season/varied_table)A Varied Table$().$(br2)$(bold)To craft:$() a $(italic)Book$() + any $(italic)crop$() — wheat, a carrot, a cabbage, whatever the field gave you.
pages.title: Food History Book
